mapper.select: /* DB 목록 조회 common.selectDbList */ SELECT A.COMP_ID AS PARAM_COMP_ID, A.DB_ID AS DB_ID, B.COMP_NM FROM COM_COMP_DBINFO A LEFT JOIN COM_COMPINFO B ON A.COMP_ID = B.COMP_ID WHERE B.USE_YN != 'N' ORDER BY B.COMP_NM
/* DB ID 조회 common.selectDbId */ SELECT DB_ID FROM COM_COMP_DBINFO WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId}
/* 관리자 접근 IP 목록 조회 common.selectAdminPageAccessIpList */ SELECT ALLOW_IP FROM ${masterDbId}.COM_ACCESS_ACL WHERE USER_ID = 'ADMIN_PAGE'
/* 테마 컬러 옵션 조회 common.comSelectColorList */ SELECT A.COLOR_ID , A.COLOR_NM , A.COLOR_KEY , A.COLOR_HEX , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_COLOR A ORDER BY A.COLOR_ID
/* 테마 아이콘 옵션 조회 common.comSelectIconList */ SELECT A.ICON_ID , A.ICON_NM , A.ICON_CLASS_NM , A.ICON_FILE_NM , A.ICON_FILE_PATH , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_ICON A ORDER BY A.ICON_ID

/* 공유 지식 카드 단건 조회 common.selectSharedCardInfo */ SELECT CARD_ID , USER_ID , CATEGORY_ID , LOG_ID , SVC_TY , TITLE , TAGS , PIN_YN , ARCHIVE_YN , ARCHIVE_DT , SORT_ORD , SQL_CODE , NEW_YN , THUMB_IMG , USE_YN , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_KNOW_CARD WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CARD_ID = #{cardId}
mapper.insert: /* 공유 받은 지식 카드 복사 등록 common.insertReceiveKnowledgeCard */ INSERT INTO TB_KNOW_CARD ( CARD_ID , USER_ID , CATEGORY_ID , LOG_ID , SVC_TY , TITLE , TAGS , PIN_YN , ARCHIVE_YN , ARCHIVE_DT , SORT_ORD , SQL_CODE , NEW_YN , THUMB_IMG , USE_YN , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT ) SELECT #{cardId} , #{userId} , #{categoryId} , LOG_ID , SVC_TY , TITLE , TAGS , 'N' , 'N' , NULL , #{sortOrd} , SQL_CODE , 'Y' , THUMB_IMG , 'Y' , NOW() , NULL FROM TB_KNOW_CARD WHERE CARD_ID = #{srcCardId}
mapper.select: /* 알림 목록 조회 common.selectNotifyList */ SELECT A.NOTIFY_ID , A.USER_ID , A.SEND_USER_ID , B.USER_NM AS SEND_USER_NM , A.NOTIFY_TY_CD , A.TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.REF_ID , A.READ_YN , A.READ_DT , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , C.SAVE_YN FROM TB_NOTIFY A LEFT JOIN TB_USER B ON B.USER_ID = A.SEND_USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_KNOW_CARD_SHARE C ON A.NOTIFY_TY_CD = 'KS' AND C.SHARE_ID = A.REF_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC
